title: Holy Basil (Tulsi) for Anxiety and Focus After 40: An Evidence-Based Review
author: Happy Aging Team
reviewer: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD, FACC, RPVI
meta_description: Holy basil (tulsi) is popular for stress and focus after 40, but how strong is the evidence? An honest, research-based review comparing tulsi to ashwagandha and other adaptogens.
